scripts.install: cd frontend && pnpm install && cd ../api && pnpm install
scripts.dev:api: cd api && npx migrate up && npx tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.json --watch src/main/backend.ts
scripts.test:api: cd api && npx vitest --run && cd .. && pnpm run seed:mongo-local:small
scripts.build: pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:api
scripts.seed:mongo-local:small: cd api && npx tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.json scripts/seedMongo.ts
